de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class TermLabelSV

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractOperator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSV
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.TermLabelSV
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TermLabel, Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, SchemaVariable, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, Sorted

    public final class TermLabelSV
extends AbstractSV
implements SchemaVariable, TermLabel
    A schema variable which matches term labels

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods

      Object getChild(int i)
      Retrieves the i-th parameter object of this term label.

      Gets the number of parameters of this term label.

      Creates a parseable string representation of the declaration of the schema variable.

      boolean validTopLevel(Term term)
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator.

    • Method Detail

      • proofToString

        public String proofToString()
        Description copied from interface: SchemaVariable
        Creates a parseable string representation of the declaration of the schema variable.
        Specified by:
        proofToString in interface SchemaVariable

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class AbstractOperator

      • validTopLevel

        public boolean validTopLevel(Term term)
        Description copied from interface: Operator
        Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
        Specified by:
        validTopLevel in interface Operator
        Overrides:
        validTopLevel in class AbstractOperator
        Returns:
        true iff the top level structure of the Term is valid.

      • getChild

        public Object getChild(int i)
        Description copied from interface: TermLabel
        Retrieves the i-th parameter object of this term label.

        A term label may have structure, i.e. can be parameterized.

        Specified by:
        getChild in interface TermLabel
        Parameters:
        i - the number of the parameter to retrieve ( 0 <= i < getChildCount())
        Returns:
        the selected parameter

      • getChildCount

        public int getChildCount()
        Description copied from interface: TermLabel
        Gets the number of parameters of this term label.
        Specified by:
        getChildCount in interface TermLabel
        Returns:
        the number of parameters (a non-negative number)
